jobs.name: Morning summary
jobs.prompt: Compile a 5-bullet morning summary: today's calendar (use whatever tools you have), unread items I flagged yesterday, and any drift detection alerts. Be terse.

jobs.name: Weekly review
jobs.prompt: [SILENT] Internally review last week's journal entries, identify three patterns, and persist them via memory_add. Also check stalled kanban tasks older than 5 days and surface them in chat.

jobs.name: Morning research brief
jobs.prompt: Pull a 3-bullet research brief on whatever topic I starred in MEMORY.md yesterday. Cite sources. No speculation.
